_description: Curated subset of method_out.json for the cross-dictionary-replication demo. Contains, per Gemma-Scope SAE dictionary, the compact per-concept results (re-derived anchors, per-sub-context recall-holes + firing-Jaccards, broad K-track KG-repair variants with one-sided p-values, and surgical edit cases) plus gating + BH-FDR multiplicity. The notebook re-derives the four auditability-spine pieces (homograph holes / repair-FDR / surgical edit / router transfer) and the REPLICATES/PARTIAL verdicts from this saved output -- no GPU / model re-run -- mirroring repatch_verdicts.py. saved.* are the published tables, kept only to cross-check the re-derivation.

honest_negatives: taxonomic/Jordan/kg_ktrack: KG-add buys no measurable fix beyond random (gain_kg=0.008, random p95=0.032, CI=-0.009..0.016, p=0.5778)

k_localization.conclusion: KG names exactly one addable auditable latent per sub-context; the (k) example-reweighting probe yields a dense hyperplane that does NOT localize to any single SAE latent -> no per-sub-context handle.

honest_negatives: numeric/integer/kg_ktrack: KG-add buys no measurable fix beyond random (gain_kg=0.000, random p95=0.020, CI=-0.005..-0.004, p=1.0000)

k_localization.conclusion: KG names exactly one addable auditable latent per sub-context; the (k) example-reweighting probe yields a dense hyperplane that does NOT localize to any single SAE latent -> no per-sub-context handle.

verdict.notes: Per-piece REPLICATES/PARTIAL/DICTIONARY-DEPENDENT for homograph-holes, repair-FDR, surgical edit, and router transfer on each dictionary; anchors+absorbers re-derived per dictionary. A clean non-replication is the publishable wider-SAE-absorbs-more (dictionary-dependence) finding.
